exercise.name: Bodyweight Squats
exercise.instructions: 3 sets of 10. Keep chest up, knees tracking toes.

exercise.name: Push-up Circuit
exercise.instructions: 4 sets of 8 push-ups with 30s rest. Modify on knees if needed.

exercise.name: 10-min Brisk Walk
exercise.instructions: Walk at a pace where you can still talk but feel slightly breathless.

exercise.name: Jumping Jacks
exercise.instructions: 3 sets of 30 seconds. Good warmup for morning energy.

mental.name: Box Breathing
mental.instructions: Inhale 4 counts, hold 4, exhale 4, hold 4. Repeat 5 cycles.

mental.name: Gratitude Journal
mental.instructions: Write 3 things you're grateful for. Be specific — not just 'my family' but why.

mental.name: Body Scan Meditation
mental.instructions: Lie down. Slowly notice each body part from toes to head. Release tension as you go.

mental.name: Stoic Morning Reflection
mental.instructions: Identify one thing outside your control today. Decide to let it go.

reading.name: Read 1 Article + 3 Takeaways
reading.instructions: Pick one article on a topic you're curious about. Write 3 bullet takeaways.

reading.name: Book Chapter (10 mins)
reading.instructions: Read one chapter or 10 pages of your current book. No phone.

reading.name: Newsletter Review
reading.instructions: Read one email newsletter you've been meaning to catch up on.

hanging.name: Send a Check-in Text
hanging.instructions: Message one friend or family member you haven't spoken to in a while. Keep it genuine.

hanging.name: Voice Note to a Friend
hanging.instructions: Record a 2-minute voice note to someone you care about. More personal than text.

hanging.name: Schedule a Catch-up
hanging.instructions: Pick someone you've been meaning to see. Send a specific date/time invite.

supplements.name: Morning Hydration
supplements.instructions: Drink 500ml of water before your first coffee. Add electrolytes if you exercise.

supplements.name: Supplement Check-in
supplements.instructions: Take your daily supplements with a full glass of water.

supplements.name: Evening Magnesium
supplements.instructions: Take magnesium glycinate 30-60 mins before bed for better sleep.

neck_shoulder.name: Chin Tucks
neck_shoulder.instructions: Sit tall. Gently retract chin straight back (not down). Hold 5s, repeat 10x. 3 sets.

neck_shoulder.name: Doorway Chest Stretch
neck_shoulder.instructions: Stand in doorway, arms at 90°. Lean forward gently until you feel chest stretch. Hold 30s x 3.

neck_shoulder.name: Neck Side Stretch
neck_shoulder.instructions: Drop right ear to right shoulder. Hold 30s. Repeat left side. 2 rounds each.

neck_shoulder.name: Shoulder Rolls
neck_shoulder.instructions: Roll shoulders forward 10x, backward 10x. Then add neck rotation each direction.

workout.name: Upper Body Day
workout.instructions: Push-ups 4x10, Pike push-ups 3x8, Tricep dips 3x10, Diamond push-ups 3x8.

workout.name: Lower Body Day
workout.instructions: Squats 4x12, Lunges 3x10 each, Glute bridges 3x15, Calf raises 3x20.

workout.name: Core Circuit
workout.instructions: Plank 30s, Dead bug 10 reps, Hollow hold 20s, Bicycle crunches 20 reps. 3 rounds.
